div1.entryFree: Curtal, adj. having a docked tail: my c. dog plays not at all, Pilgr. 273. hope is a c. dog in some affairs, Wiv. II, 1, 114 (such a dog being thought unfit for the chase). she had transformed me to a c. dog and made me turn i' the wheel, Err. III, 2, 151. -- Used of a horse: I'ld give bay C. and his furniture, All's II, 3, 65.
